'''Eredin''' was an [[Water/Legends|ice]]-bound [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Astal sector/Legends|Astal sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{Planet-stub}}
